info.title: Dropbox API v2
info.description: The Dropbox API v2 allows developers to integrate with Dropbox for file storage, sharing, user management, and team administration. All endpoints use POST (except download-style endpoints which also support GET). Parameters are sent as JSON in the request body for RPC-style endpoints, or in the Dropbox-API-Arg header for upload/download-style endpoints.

post.description: Performs App Authentication, validating the supplied app key and secret, and returns the supplied string.
Performs User Authentication and returns the supplied string. Used to test connectivity.
Returns the metadata for a file or folder.

path.description: The path of a file or folder on Dropbox.

post.description: Starts returning the contents of a folder.

path.description: Path to the folder. Empty string for root.

post.description: Once a cursor has been retrieved from list_folder, use this to paginate through all files and retrieve updates.
A way to quickly get a cursor for the folder's state. Unlike list_folder, this doesn't return any entries.
Searches for files and folders. Supports full-text search for Dropbox Business accounts.
Fetches the next page of search results returned from search_v2.
Create a folder at a given path.
Delete the file or folder at a given path.
Permanently delete the file or folder at a given path.
Copy a file or folder to a different location in the user's Dropbox.
Move a file or folder to a different location in the user's Dropbox.
Copy multiple files or folders to different locations at once in the user's Dropbox.

200.description: Async job ID or complete result

post.description: Move multiple files or folders to different locations at once.

200.description: Async job ID or complete result

post.description: Delete multiple files/folders at once.

200.description: Async job ID or complete result

post.description: Get a temporary link to stream content of a file. The link expires after four hours.
Get a one-time use temporary upload link to upload a file to a Dropbox location.
Returns revisions for files based on a file path or a file id.
Restore a specific revision of a file to the given path.

post.summary: Save a URL to a file
post.description: Save the data from a specified URL into a file in user's Dropbox.

200.description: Async job ID or complete result

post.description: Check the status of a save_url job.
Lock the files at the given paths.
Unlock the files at the given paths.
Return the lock metadata for the given list of paths.

post.summary: Add a tag to a file
post.description: Add a tag to an item.

post.summary: Remove a tag from a file
post.description: Remove a tag from an item.
Get list of tags assigned to items.
Upload sessions allow you to upload a single file in one or more requests. Start a new upload session.
Append more data to an upload session.
Finish an upload session and save the uploaded data to the given file path.
Finish multiple upload sessions at once. Allows up to 1000 entries.

200.description: Batch result or async job ID

post.description: Create a shared link with custom settings.
List shared links of this user. If no path is given, returns all shared links.
Modify the settings of an existing shared link.
Get the shared link's metadata.
Revoke a shared link.
Share a folder with collaborators.

200.description: Shared folder metadata or async job ID

post.description: Allows an owner or editor of a shared folder to add another member.
Allows an owner or editor to remove another member from a shared folder.
Return the list of all shared folders the current user has access to.
Returns shared folder membership.
Use to obtain the members who have been invited to a file, both inherited and uninherited members.
Adds specified members to a file.

200.description: List of file member action results

post.description: Returns a list of all files shared with the current user.
The current user mounts the designated folder to their Dropbox.
The current user unmounts the designated folder.
Update the sharing policies for a shared folder.
Get information about the current user's account.
Get information about a user's account.
Get information about multiple user accounts.
Get the space usage information for the current user's account.
Get a list of feature values that may be configured for the current account.
Disables the access token used to authenticate the call.
Removes all manually added contacts.
Removes specified manually added contacts.
Creates a file request for the authenticated user.
Returns the specified file request.
Returns a list of file requests owned by this user.
Update a file request.
Delete a batch of closed file requests.
Delete all closed file requests owned by this user.
Returns the total number of file requests owned by this user.
Add property groups to a Dropbox file.
Overwrite property groups associated with a file.
Update property groups associated with a file.
Remove specified property groups from a file.
Search across property templates for particular property field values.
Add a template associated with a user.
Retrieves team events. Events have a lifespan of two years.
